name: Distill long emails with PostgreSQL and Telegram without manual work

parameters.errorMessage: Missing required field 'from' on incoming email.

options.systemMessage: You are a drip campaigns specialist for the email automation team. Use the attached tools to look up real data before answering — never invent email details. Keep answers under 150 words, cite which tool you used, and escalate anything you cannot verify.

parameters.toolDescription: Fetch live email data from the internal REST API by id or query.

nodes.name: Deliver Answer + Log to Google Sheets

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM emails WHERE updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day' ORDER BY updated_at DESC;

parameters.text: =✅ Distill long emails with PostgreSQL and Telegram without manual work — run completed at {{ $now.toFormat('HH:mm') }}

parameters.content:
### Receive Inbound Webhook

Entry point: listens for POST calls on `/wf02940-email`. Use the TEST url while building, switch callers to the PRODUCTION url after publishing.

Next: Required Fields Present?

### Required Fields Present?

Two-way gate on `={{ $json.from }}`. TRUE continues the happy path, FALSE takes the alternate branch.

Ports: ①→ Reason & Act (AI Agent) · ②→ Abort — Malformed Input

### Abort — Malformed Input

Fails fast with a clear message; triggers the error workflow instead of processing bad data.

### Reason & Act (AI Agent)

The AI brain: reads the input, decides which attached tools to call (and in what order), then composes the answer.

Ports: ①→ Shape Agent Output · ②→ Capture Failure Context

⚠ failures exit via the error rail

### Google Gemini Chat Model

Chat model powering the AI step (model: `models/gemini-2.5-flash`). Swap providers here without rewiring.

Feeds **Reason & Act (AI Agent)** as `languageModel`

🔑 Google AI API key

### Lookup API Data

Tool the agent can call to hit the REST API with parameters it chooses at runtime.

Feeds **Reason & Act (AI Agent)** as `tool`

### Think It Through

Scratchpad tool: lets the agent reason step-by-step before acting.

Feeds **Reason & Act (AI Agent)** as `tool`

### Conversation Memory

Conversation memory keyed by session — the bot remembers earlier turns for each user separately.

Feeds **Reason & Act (AI Agent)** as `memory`

### Shape Agent Output

Shapes the item: writes `answer`, `confidence`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Confident Enough?

### Confident Enough?

Two-way gate on `={{ $json.confidence }}`. TRUE continues the happy path, FALSE takes the alternate branch.

Ports: ①→ Deliver Answer + Log to Google Sheets · ②→ Escalate to Human Queue

### Deliver Answer + Log to Google Sheets

Appends a new row to 'Email Tracker' — a human-readable audit trail that doesn't require opening n8n to inspect.

Ports: ①→ Join Outcomes · ②→ Capture Failure Context

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 Google OAuth2 / service account

nodes.name: Note: Deliver Answer + Log to Google Sheets

parameters.content:
### Escalate to Human Queue

Sends a Telegram message to the configured chat — the same bot can also receive replies, so this doubles as a two-way ops channel.

Ports: ①→ Join Outcomes · ②→ Capture Failure Context

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 Telegram bot token

### Join Outcomes

Rejoins 2 branches into one stream (mode: append) so downstream logic runs once.

Next: Load Previous Snapshot

### Load Previous Snapshot

Runs a parameterized SQL statement against Postgres — values are bound via `queryReplacement`, not string-interpolated, so it's immune to SQL injection.

Ports: ①→ Compute Drift vs Snapshot · ②→ Capture Failure Context

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 Postgres connection

### Compute Drift vs Snapshot

Custom JavaScript: Compare current metrics with the previous snapshot

Next: Fingerprint for Idempotency

### Fingerprint for Idempotency

Custom JavaScript: Build a stable idempotency key per email (djb2 hash, no deps)

Next: Drop Already-Processed Items

### Drop Already-Processed Items

Cross-execution dedupe: remembers keys it has processed before and drops repeats — the idempotency guard.

Next: Summarize Run Stats

### Summarize Run Stats

Shapes the item: writes `runAt`, `itemCount`, `status`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Append Audit Row (Google Sheets)

### Append Audit Row (Google Sheets)

Appends a new row to 'Email Tracker' — a human-readable audit trail that doesn't require opening n8n to inspect.

Ports: ①→ Send Summary to Telegram · ②→ Capture Failure Context

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 Google OAuth2 / service account

### Send Summary to Telegram

Sends a Telegram message to the configured chat — the same bot can also receive replies, so this doubles as a two-way ops channel.

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 Telegram bot token

### Capture Failure Context

Shapes the item: writes `failedNode`, `errorMessage`, `workflow`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Escalate Failure to Telegram

### Escalate Failure to Telegram

Sends a Telegram message to the configured chat — the same bot can also receive replies, so this doubles as a two-way ops channel.

Next: Park in Dead-Letter Queue

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Telegram bot token

### Park in Dead-Letter Queue

Appends a new row to 'Email Tracker' — a human-readable audit trail that doesn't require opening n8n to inspect.

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2 / service account

# Distill long emails with PostgreSQL and Telegram without manual work

**Pattern:** AI Summarize & Route · **Level:** Production · **Trigger:** Webhook

## What it does
Distill long emails with PostgreSQL and Telegram without manual work. It fires the moment an external system calls its webhook.

## Why it exists
Manual drip campaigns is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Receive Inbound Webhook → Required Fields Present? → Reason & Act (AI Agent) → Shape Agent Output → Confident Enough? → Deliver Answer + Log to Google Sheets → Join Outcomes → …

## Use it for
- Teams that want to ai summarize & route without manual effort
- Anyone automating drip campaigns in marketing
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Keeps your systems in sync
- Improves response time
- Has retries and error handling built in

## Before first run
Connect credentials: Google AI API key; Google OAuth2 / service account; Postgres connection; Telegram bot token.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## Try it now
Sample data is pinned on the trigger — hit **Execute Workflow** to watch it flow through every node before connecting any real credentials. Unpin the trigger (right-click → Unpin) when you're ready to go live.

## Design decisions

Uses an AI Agent, not a fixed Chain, because the assistant must choose which tool answers the question — a Chain would need one hard-coded branch per tool. The 'Confident Enough?' gate after the agent routes low-confidence answers to a human queue instead of shipping an uncertain answer: a little latency traded for not eroding trust.

## Practice exercises

Already production-grade — deepen your understanding:

1. Add one more tool to the pool with a clear one-line description and watch how the agent decides to use it.
2. Change the confidence threshold on 'Confident Enough?' and see how often answers get escalated to a human.
3. Swap the Think tool for a Vector Store tool wired to a real knowledge base and turn this into RAG.

## 🛟 Error handling & retries

External calls retry **3× with 2s backoff**. Anything still failing exits through its node's error output into the red error rail → context is captured and the on-call channel is alerted. Failures are also parked in a dead-letter queue for replay. Set an n8n **Error Workflow** in settings as the final safety net.

## 🔐 Security

Never trust inbound payloads: the webhook path is unguessable. Add header auth or IP allow-listing for defense in depth. Secrets live in n8n credentials — never in node parameters.

## 🤖 AI cluster

Purple nodes form one AI unit: the root node orchestrates, sub-nodes plug in via typed ports (model / memory / tools / parser). Swap the chat model without rewiring anything else. Costs scale with tokens — keep prompts lean and cap iterations.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your drip campaigns process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.

main.node: Deliver Answer + Log to Google Sheets
